name: Risk Factors
content:
## Risk Factors

Investing in our securities involves a high degree of risk.

### Market Risk
Our business is subject to general economic and market conditions.

### Regulatory Risk
We operate in a heavily regulated industry.

### Operational Risk
Our operations are dependent on information technology systems.

name: Management Discussion
content:
## Management Discussion and Analysis

### Overview
The following provides an analysis of our financial condition.

### Results of Operations
**Revenue:** Total revenue increased by 12% year-over-year.
**Net Income:** Net income improved by 18%.

name: Use of Proceeds
content:
## Use of Proceeds

### Working Capital (40%)
General corporate purposes.

### R&D (30%)
Expansion of technology platform.

### Acquisitions (20%)
Selective strategic acquisitions.

### Debt Reduction (10%)
Reduce outstanding indebtedness.

name: Corporate Governance
content:
